response.overview: The documentary video is the result of the fifth memorial service, carried out in 2015 as part of a multi-year public memory collection project at the former border crossing between Nova Gorica and Gorizia. In the premises of the railway station in Nova Gorica, we collected memories and photographs of buildings in Nova Gorica and Gorizia that we pass by without knowing their stories and fates. Citizens of both Gorizias were invited to select photographs of the buildings in their albums and talk about their stories.
response.title: Portreti stavb
